label: Document tools
exportOfficeTooltip: Export to Word / Excel / PowerPoint / Image (Ctrl+Shift+E)
fillAndSignTooltip: Fill & sign — capture a typed, drawn, or imaged signature and apply it to the document.
scanDeviceTooltip: Use your OS scan utility, then drag the saved PDF here to run OCR.
redactTooltip: Mark areas for redaction (Shift+R — toggles Redaction tools)
regionCutTooltip: Cut the selected page-content region as an image
regionCopyTooltip: Copy the selected page-content region as an image
regionPasteTooltip: Paste the copied page-content region as an image
annotationLayerIdle: Annotation layer. Select a tool from the Annotation toolbar, then draw with the mouse or pen. Keyboard users: pick a tool from the toolbar; existing annotations are selectable and editable from the Inspector.
annotationLayerDrawing: Annotation drawing surface — {{tool}} tool active. Drag with the mouse or pen to draw. Keyboard users: use the Inspector to add and position annotations.

shapeTools.label: Shape annotation tools
shapeTools.areaMeasureTooltip: Closed-polygon area measure (Shift+A — double-click or Enter to close)

redactionTools.label: Redaction tools
redactionTools.markTextAria: Mark text for redaction (deferred to v2)
redactionTools.markTextTooltip: Mark text for redaction — coming in v2; use Mark Rectangle.
redactionTools.showMarksTooltip: Preview marks as overlay (no PDF mutation yet)

addLinkTooltip: Add hyperlink — drag a marquee on a page (Shift+L)
watermarkTooltip: Apply watermark to current document (opens Page Design)
headerFooterTooltip: Apply header / footer to current document (opens Page Design)
backgroundTooltip: Apply background color or image (opens Page Design)
preflightTooltip: Open Preflight panel (subset of PDF/X + PDF/A rules)
tagPdfTooltip: Open the Tag PDF tree editor (structure-tree authoring)
tagPdfAria: Open the Tag PDF tree editor
readingOrderTooltip: Toggle the Reading Order overlay (drag numbered badges to reorder)
altTextInspectorTooltip: Open the Alt Text Inspector (list figures missing alt text, bulk-set similar figures)
runAccessibilityCheckTooltip: Run the Accessibility Checker (12 shipped rules — subset of WCAG 2.1 + PDF/UA-1)
runAccessibilityCheckAria: Open the Accessibility Checker panel and run the check
exportAccessibilityReportTooltip: Export the last Accessibility Check result as HTML or JSON (Ctrl+Alt+E)
exportAccessibilityReportAria: Open the Export Accessibility Report dialog
actionWizardTooltip: Open the Action Wizard — record + replay batches (Ctrl+Shift+W)
actionWizardAria: Open the Action Wizard saved-actions list
actionWizardRecordTooltip: Start a new Action Wizard recording
actionWizardRunTooltip: Run the selected action against one or more PDFs
spellCheckSettingsTooltip: Configure spell check locale + user dictionary
fontSwapTooltip: Replace one font with a standard PDF font
compareFilesAria: Open the Compare Files setup dialog
